title: Depesche TOPModel 12943 Colouring Book Set with 76 Pages for Designing Model Motifs, Includes Colouring Template, Sticker Sheet, Pens and Much More
features: Colouring book for girls and creative minds
Design: TOPModel by Depesche colouring book with pre-printed model figures to create beautiful outfits
Creative book with 2 fold-out pages of colourful colouring templates to inspire your own designs
Colouring book set including 2 sticker sheets, 10 coloured pencils, 4 gel pens and 1 eraser pen
description: From the manufacturer TOPModel colouring book set with 76 pages for designing model motifs, incl. Colouring template, sticker sheet, pens and much more. With the colouring book set in a stylish TOPModel design, girls can let their creativity run wild and create their own outfits. The 76 page ring binder includes 2 sheets of beautiful clothing and accessories stickers, 2 fold-out pages with colourful colouring pages as well as 10 coloured pencils, 4 gel pens (gold, silver, pink, purple) and an eraser pen. The high-quality colouring book is approx. 28 x 20.4 x 2 cm and is suitable for creative leisure activities. Discover the creative world of TOPModels Do you love creative craft and painting fun, are you interested in the latest fashion trends and go through thick and thin with your BFF? Then you are just right in the creative world of TOPModels. Discover great TOPModel creative products, pencil cases, pens, bags, backpacks, beauty sets and much more. Absolute must-haves for all young girls Be creative - be TOPModel! Creative craft and colouring fun, beautiful fashion trends for young girls great BFF stories Great TOPModel products Coloring Books & Creative Books Paint yourself in the creative world of TOPModels - with the Dress Me Up colouring and sticker books, create your diamond sets, fashion doodle books and much more. ! Pencil cases Well sorted or rather messy? With the fully filled 3-compartment pencil case, the XXL pencil case or the fan pencil case, you will never run out of colour Pens & more Go through life colourful with the versatile coloured pencil sets, gel pens, coloured printed pencils, erasers, decorative tapes or whole writing sets from TopModel! Bags, Backpacks & Accessories Whether for school, leisure or sports – with the TOPModel backpacks, shoulder bags, mobile phone or tablet bags, your belongings are always with you and perfectly protected
